heading: Strategies, priorities, and annual report
label: 8221 Strategies, priorities, and annual report

Amendments2023—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c). Text read as follows: “The Annual Report on Advancing Freedom and Democracy shall include, as appropriate—Pub. L. 118–31“(1) United States priorities for the promotion of democracy and the protection of human rights for each nondemocratic country and democratic transition country, developed in consultation with relevant parties in such countries; and“(2) specific actions and activities of chiefs of missions and other United States officials to promote democracy and protect human rights in each such country.”

L. 118–31“(1) United States priorities for the promotion of democracy and the protection of human rights for each nondemocratic country and democratic transition country, developed in consultation with relevant parties in such countries; and“(2) specific actions and activities of chiefs of missions and other United States officials to promote democracy and protect human rights in each such country.”

children.heading: Expansion of country-specific strategies to promote democracy
children.label: a Expansion of country-specific strategies to promote democracy

children.heading: Commendation
children.label: 1 Commendation
children.text: Congress commends the Secretary for the ongoing work by the Department to develop country-specific strategies for promoting democracy.

children.heading: Expansion
children.label: 2 Expansion
children.text: The Secretary shall expand the development of such strategies to all nondemocratic countries and democratic transition countries.

children.heading: Briefings
children.label: 3 Briefings
children.text: The Secretary shall keep the appropriate congressional committees fully and currently informed as such strategies are developed.
